raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.3": 4, "R1.6": 4, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised draft maintains logical consistency by clearly describing the pipeline stages and their purpose.",
    "R1.3": "The agent identified and addressed several claims that required evidence support, such as the robustness of the pipeline to observation cadence variations.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is improved with a clearer structure and more precise language, though some phrases are still slightly overassertive.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty in the benchmarking results but did not provide explicit confidence levels or missing evidence details.",
    "RX.3": "The revised draft covers all aspects of the original artifact without significant drift from the requested scope.",
    "RX.4": "The output avoids introducing new errors and harmful content, with a minor regression in fully addressing the robustness claim.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provided some notes on changes, it did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The revised draft maintains logical consistency by clearly describing the pipeline stages and their purpose.
rationale.R1.3: The agent identified and addressed several claims that required evidence support, such as the robustness of the pipeline to observation cadence variations.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is improved with a clearer structure and more precise language, though some phrases are still slightly overassertive.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty in the benchmarking results but did not provide explicit confidence levels or missing evidence details.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft covers all aspects of the original artifact without significant drift from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoids introducing new errors and harmful content, with a minor regression in fully addressing the robustness claim.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provided some notes on changes, it did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
